title: Epiphyllanthus microsphaericus
taxonomy: Epiphyllanthus microsphaericus is classified under the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. This family comprises of approximately 280 genera and over 10,000 species of flowering plants. Euphorbiaceae is an ancient family, dating back to the Paleozoic era, approximately 300 million years ago. The family is widely distributed across the world, with species found in tropical and temperate regions. Epiphyllanthus microsphaericus, in particular, belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family, showcasing its unique characteristics and adaptations.
